case_title: JAMES LABONTE VS. UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC, ARTHUR A. DUGONI SCHOOL ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-25-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LABONTE, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC, ARTHUR A. DUGONI SCHOOL OF DENTISTRY UPADHYAY, NAMRATA JAIMAN PLAINTIFF PRODUCED NO EVIDENCE THAT SUPPORTS THAT DEFENDANTS FELL BELOW THE STANDARD OF CARE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
